url.description: The URL of the Shelve instance can be overridden with the `SHELVE_URL` environment variable

defaultEnv.description: The default env use by the command like `run`, `push` or `pull`

confirmChanges.description: Whether to confirm changes before pushing them to Shelve

autoCreateProject.description: Whether to automatically create a project if it doesn't exist

sync.description: Sync policies for push, pull, and conflict resolution

protectedEnvironments.description: Environment names where push is blocked

sourceOfTruth.description: Whether Shelve (remote) or the local env file is authoritative for shelve sync

onPushConflict.description: How to handle keys that differ between local file and Shelve on push

pullMode.description: Replace the env file on pull, or merge remote keys into the existing file

allowPush.description: Allow pushing variables to this environment

allowPull.description: Allow pulling variables from this environment

requireConfirmation.description: Require confirmation before push or pull writes
